## Type

- [ ] New core command
- [ ] New pack
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Improvement to existing command

## Checklist

- [ ] Command name is plain English (grandma test)
- [ ] Has `.SYNOPSIS` and `.EXAMPLE`
- [ ] Dangerous ops confirm before executing
- [ ] Added to help menu
- [ ] Tested on Windows PowerShell 5.1+
- [ ] No external dependencies (core) or documented (packs)
